Visited Fu Asia some days ago and loved the food and ambience. We choose the buffet which has a variety of options to offer.The team is also very welcoming and friendly.I mistakenly ordered a wrong drink with alcohol and they were nice to exchange it.Definitely going to visit again.

It's a hard find in Austria that serves authentic Chinese dishes that reminds me of home. I tried their popular soup ramen the other day and it brought me back to my childhood when my grandma would make me this bowl of soup ramen when I came home from school :) aside from the good food, the interior is really nice as well - clean, spacious and bright. Will try their buffet next time as I saw it looks quite good but I was too full to have more 🤣
